title: Rolai Frac
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Rolai Frac |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Leadership School]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|The mission just changed a bit ... We're supposed to fire on the fleet ... We thought you might object," Rolai said. "After the last mission, you had some misgivings about organic damage."
"Organic damage?" Marit said in disbelief. "Is that what you're calling it now? They were living beings!|[[Marit Dice]] confronts Rolai Frac about withholding critical information about their mission for Ierian ruler [[Rana Halion]] to preemptively strike Andara|''[[Jedi Quest: The School of Fear]]''}} '''Rolai Frac''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] member of a squad of young [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] that trained secretly at the elite [[Leadership School]] of [[Andara/Legends|Andara]] before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Short in stature, with long, curling hair down to his shoulders, Frac was in charge of the group's finances and served as security expert. Ostracized by the wealthier students because he was admitted to the school on scholarship, Frac and the other squad members planned to kill [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and frame a wealthy politician—the [[Berm Tarturi|Senator-father]], in fact, of his squad's mercenary leader, [[Gillam Tarturi]]. The plan was [[Mission to Andara|foiled]] by Skywalker and his [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], who arrested the young mercenaries and took them to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] upon their expulsion from the school, to sort out the lies, betrayals, and criminal activity that had occurred within the group. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Quest: The School of Fear]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Rolai Frac }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Frac, Rolai}} [[Category:Bothans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Mercenaries]]
